productDisplayName: Puma Women Apex Grey Pink Floater
description: Look trendy and stay comfortable in these black Apex floaters from puma. This black and red pair can be teamed with cargo shorts and tees for a cool casual look.Upper Synthetic uppers with synthetic woven tape straps on the forefoot and ankle attached by a diagonal strap across the midfoot Velcro strap enclosures on the forefoot and on the ankle strap for  a snug Fit Logo name on the ankle strap, cat logo on the midfoot diagonal strap and brand name on the pull tab Lightly cushioned lining for better comfort Midsole Cushioned foam footbed with hexagonal pattern for all-day comfort Outsole Rubber outsole with multi-directional lugs for superior grip Wash careRub surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
